# Internal Audit Summer Internship Program

In Internal Audit, we assess the control processes that drive our global business—identifying areas of improvement to help safeguard the firm. These reviews begin with understanding our business processes, developing process flows, and testing and presenting reports to management. We work with regulators, business leaders, and others to make sure we’re doing this in the most effective manner. Our team is divided into two areas of focus, technology and business audit.

Applications are currently closed

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

You'll make meaningful contributions to our global business operations on one of our internal audit teams, which support Asset & Wealth Management, Consumer & Community Banking, Commercial & Investment Banking, Corporate Functions, and Enterprise Technology. Our teams identify and analyze risks in our businesses and evaluate how we control those. You’ll also test controls by reviewing documents, meeting with management, and observing operations. You’ll learn about our businesses from the inside, gaining detailed knowledge of the industry and how our teams and technology function together.

Our technology teams focus on reviews of business applications, data management, global infrastructure, digital technologies, and cyber/information security. By providing management with feedback regarding the control environment, you’ll help to safeguard our firm and continue to best serve our clients.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We’re looking for professionals from a variety of backgrounds, experiences, and skills to join our team. We expect you to have the highest standards of integrity and professionalism with a strong work ethic. You’ll need to have strong attention to detail and be able to see the big picture. We’re looking for independent, analytical thinkers who can quickly adapt to new situations. You should be able to clearly communicate with all types of people and provide advice to our businesses.

#### **Key skills**

We’re looking for those who are honest, curious, collaborative, well-rounded, and motivated. You should have an interest in business, finance, or technology, as well as the ability to apply what you know to complex situations.

### What we offer

Interns work as either business or technology auditors in this nine-week program. Candidates can apply to either the business track or the technology track. As interns, your experience may range from analyzing inherent business risk and testing controls to reviewing digital technologies and evaluating information security.

#### **On-the-job experience**

As an intern, you'll support various phases of internal audits, working on continuous monitoring strategies, fieldwork testing, business walkthroughs, and reporting of internal audit issues.

#### **Training**

You’ll begin the program with a week of core audit and soft-skills training, including communication and Excel best practices. Over the course of the summer, you’ll learn about the firm’s lines of business via various trainings.

#### **Career progression**

This internship can set up your next career move. High-performing interns who successfully complete the program may receive full-time offers with the bank.

# Global Private Bank Analyst Program

For more than 200 years, we have been working with innovators, entrepreneurs, industry leaders, and their families to help them achieve their unique ambitions, secure their legacies, and make a difference in the world. That means providing meaningful, tailored advice now and across generations. The Private Bank helps clients plan, invest, borrow, and bank to create the life and legacy they envision.

# Human Resources Analyst Development Program

Our people are our greatest asset, and investing in attracting, retaining, and developing them is a top priority. Working in Human Resources is more than payroll and benefits—we have programs to recruit and train our talent, as well as help them build fulfilling, rewarding careers. We’re constantly adding new initiatives to create engaged employees who are developing new skills. Joining our community means impacting millions of people and making sure we have the right talent to innovate for the future.

Applications are currently closed

## Apply now



Please note, only locations where this program is currently open will be displayed. If you're not able to find your desired location, please follow us on Facebook or Linkedin for program application updates.


## Inside the program

### What you'll do

While your day-to-day responsibilities will vary depending on the function and line of business, you’ll make a direct impact on our employee programs. Projects may include contributing to our industry-leading performance management, training and development programs; working on recruiting initiatives, learning how to build successful teams, and working with business partners on strategy, planning, and project management.

You’ll analyze and present data to senior business leaders, help with program management, and work with businesses to improve training. By owning projects right from the beginning, you’ll refine your skills while building your professional network across the firm through mentorships and working with senior leaders.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We’re looking for highly motivated, analytical, and passionate people who will challenge the way we do things and aren’t intimidated to provide feedback so we can improve. You should be flexible, adaptable, and enjoy working with people. We’re always looking for innovative ways to improve our processes and engage employees, so bring your best ideas.

#### **Key skills**

# Investment Banking Seasonal Analyst Program

Investment banking teams partner with corporate clients to achieve their strategic goals. Whether it is raising capital for an expansion or buying another company, investment bankers provide innovative and creative financial solutions for all clients’ needs. We’re looking for analytical thinkers who thrive on building long-term relationships. You’ll be part of a global, fast-paced team that does business with more than 90% of Fortune 500 companies. Depending on your location, you’ll work with us for three to six months during the spring, fall, or winter.

[Apply now](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/investment-banking-seasonal-analyst#first-apply-now-link)

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

Available in specific Asia Pacific or European locations, the seasonal internship program typically runs for three to six months during your academic year. The program offers opportunities to be involved in projects across that geography.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We value diversity of thought, backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We’re looking for those who have innovative ideas and entrepreneurial qualities, and who enjoy tackling new challenges and solving intellectual problems.

We’re looking for hard-working, resourceful, analytical thinkers who are ready to make a contribution from the beginning. If you have exceptional interpersonal and communication skills and thrive in a dynamic, collaborative environment, then this is the role for you.

#### **Key skills**

We’re looking for excellent problem-solving, organization, and communication skills. You should have strict attention to detail, be a quick learner, and enjoy working in an ever-changing, fast-paced environment. We’re looking for flexible, adaptable, analytical thinkers who bring a comprehensive knowledge of global markets and a strong interest in financial services. You should have excellent business writing, research, and quantitative skills. Being client and solutions-focused, collaborative, and executing work with integrity are musts.

### What we offer

#### **On-the-job experience**

You’ll have meaningful responsibility right from the start by participating in live transactions, attending morning meetings for market updates, participating in deal organization meetings, conducting research, performing financial valuations, and finalizing pitch models.

#### **Training**

To help you get started in a real-world setting, the program kicks off with classroom training covering the basics of investment banking and practical skills.

#### **Career progression**

Depending on program performance, you could be asked to join our traditional summer internship program or receive an offer of employment after university.

# Innovate for Impact Case Study Competition

The Innovate for Impact Case Study Competition puts you at the center of the action. You’ll work in teams of four to tackle a hypothetical business challenge, gaining insights into three of our Corporate Functions Early Careers programs. Along the way, you’ll build industry knowledge and strengthen your communication and analytical skills—preparing you for success in our internship and full-time opportunities.

Registration is closed

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

As a participant, you’ll form a team of four students from your university to collaborate with on a business challenge. You’ll gain insights into our businesses, connect with senior leaders, and develop skills to prepare you for future opportunities at the firm.

The competition consists of a single round, with participants working closely with case study mentors. The first half is virtual, followed by an invitation for teams to present live, in person, to JPMorganChase business representatives. You’ll also have the opportunity to learn more about our internship programs, in particular:

- [Corporate Analyst Development Program](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/cadp-summer-analyst)
- [Global Finance and Business Management Analyst Program](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/finance-summer-analyst)
- [Internal Audit Analyst Program](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/internal-audit-summer-internship)

### Who we're looking for

#### **Desired qualities**

We’re seeking college sophomores studying in the United States who are interested in our Corporate Functions Early Careers programs. Participants are motivated, clear communicators, and analytical thinkers. If you are curious, focused, enjoy collaboration, and like solving new challenges, this is the opportunity for you.

#### **Key skills**

We value strong problem-solving skills and adaptability in dynamic environments. The ideal participant is proactive, responsive, and excels in fast-paced, collaborative settings. Effective time management, prioritization, and communication skills are essential. We are especially interested in students considering full-time opportunities in Columbus, OH, or Newark/Wilmington, DE after graduation.

### What we offer

#### **Introduction**

Over three months, you’ll attend virtual sessions designed to build your skills and introduce you to JPMorganChase. Each participant is assigned two mentors for guidance throughout the competition.

#### **On-the-job experience**

You’ll work in teams to analyze a hypothetical business challenge, gaining insights into three of our Corporate Functions internship programs. This experience will help you strengthen your industry knowledge, communication, and analytical skills, and identify which program best fits your interests and goals.

#### **Training**

Teams that complete the curriculum will be invited to present live to a panel of judges and JPMorganChase business representatives.

#### **Career progression**

Participants who perform well may be considered for future internship opportunities.

# Asset Management Summer Analyst Program

J.P. Morgan Asset Management is a leading investment manager of choice for institutions, financial intermediaries, and individual investors worldwide. The business offers a broad range of core and alternative investment strategies and has investment professionals operating in every major market around the world.

Through this program, you’ll either be a summer analyst on the Client track, with the opportunity to analyze and develop investment strategies that support our clients' needs, or the Product track, with the opportunity to research, grow, and manage investment solutions for our global clients.

[Apply now](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/asset-management-summer-analyst#first-apply-now-link)

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

As a summer **Client Analyst**, you'll partner with our senior business leaders to develop strategies that support our clients' needs. You’ll collaborate with teams that manage and distribute investment solutions across asset classes for institutions and financial intermediaries.

As a summer **Product Analyst**, you'll collaborate with industry experts to develop investment solutions for our corporate, government, not-for-profit and individual clients worldwide. You'll work with client portfolio managers, traders, research analysts, marketers and client advisors to analyze and execute investments strategies.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Key skills**

You should possess superior multi-tasking, organizational, and communication skills, plus the ability to leverage quantitative and qualitative resources to understand complex financial situations and present solutions.

Those interested in the **Client** track should demonstrate aptitude for sales and client relationship management, as well as strong communication and presentation skills. Individuals interested in the **Product** track should show interest and fluency in financial markets and macro-level economic trends, exceptional analytical skills, high aptitudes for numbers and strong modelling skills.

#### **Valued qualities**

We’re looking for highly-motivated students who are interested in learning about the asset management industry. You’ll need a genuine interest in financial markets, investing, and macro-level economics, as well as the ability to take initiative. You’ll also need good judgment, discretion when working with confidential information, and integrity.

### What we offer

#### **On-the-job experience**

Over the summer, you’ll have the opportunity to learn how our teams research, analyze, and develop investment strategies and models for institutions, financial intermediaries, and individual investors around the globe, working alongside some of the top minds in the field.

#### **Training**

The program begins with a three to five-day orientation to introduce you to the firm and our business. As the summer progresses, you’ll have the opportunity to attend senior speaker events, skills-building workshops, and networking opportunities.

#### **Career progression**

This internship can serve as a launch pad for your career. High performing interns may receive an offer of continued employment with the firm.

![](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/content/dam/jpmorganchase/images/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/asset-management-summer-analyst.jpg)

As a summer **Client Analyst**, you'll partner with our senior business leaders to develop strategies that support our clients' needs. You’ll collaborate with teams that manage and distribute investment solutions across asset classes for institutions and financial intermediaries.

As a summer **Product Analyst**, you'll collaborate with industry experts to develop investment solutions for our corporate, government, not-for-profit and individual clients worldwide. You'll work with client portfolio managers, traders, research analysts, marketers and client advisors to analyze and execute investments strategies.

#### **Key skills**

You should possess superior multi-tasking, organizational, and communication skills, plus the ability to leverage quantitative and qualitative resources to understand complex financial situations and present solutions.

# Business Relationship Manager Trainee Program

The Business Relationship Manager Trainee Program is an excellent opportunity to begin exploring your career goals, in addition to growing your skills in Business Banking. Our Business Relationship Managers work directly with business owners in local communities, helping them manage cash flow today and secure the financing they need to grow tomorrow.

Applications are currently closed

## Inside the Program

### What you’ll do

During the first phase of the program, you’ll participate in immersive job shadowing experiences, assist in business development and prospecting new clients, and conduct product, market, and client research.

During the second phase of the program, you’ll focus on portfolio management — acquiring, managing, and retaining a portfolio of business clients for your assigned branches.

### Who we’re looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We’re looking for candidates with a strong desire to build a network and start a career in the financial industry working with small business owners.

#### **Key skills**

Excellent customer service, organizational, and leadership skills, with the ability to build strong, collaborative working relationships and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

### What we offer

As a Business Relationship Manager Trainee, you can explore your potential through hands-on experience in a professional environment. In this program, you will have the opportunity to develop skills and knowledge related to financial acumen, Chase and Business Banking culture, relationship management, and professional skills through a variety of educational and experiential activities.

#### **On-the-job experience**

You'll have the opportunity to participate in meaningful and relevant work, including conducting in-person calls with prospects and existing clients at their places of business, identifying and pursuing potential new business clients, and building collaborative relationships with partners across lines of business to connect clients with specialists who can help meet their financial needs.

#### **Training**

Over the course of the program, you’ll have access to professional and leadership development training, networking, business deep dives, and one-on-one mentorship.

#### **Career Progression**

After successfully completing the full-time program, highly motivated Analysts may have the opportunity to move into a Business Relationship Manager role.

![](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/content/dam/jpmorganchase/images/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/business-relationship-manager-trainee-program.jpg)

### What you’ll do

During the first phase of the program, you’ll participate in immersive job shadowing experiences, assist in business development and prospecting new clients, and conduct product, market, and client research.

During the second phase of the program, you’ll focus on portfolio management — acquiring, managing, and retaining a portfolio of business clients for your assigned branches.

### Who we’re looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We’re looking for candidates with a strong desire to build a network and start a career in the financial industry working with small business owners.

#### **Key skills**

Excellent customer service, organizational, and leadership skills, with the ability to build strong, collaborative working relationships and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

### What we offer

As a Business Relationship Manager Trainee, you can explore your potential through hands-on experience in a professional environment. In this program, you will have the opportunity to develop skills and knowledge related to financial acumen, Chase and Business Banking culture, relationship management, and professional skills through a variety of educational and experiential activities.

#### **On-the-job experience**

You'll have the opportunity to participate in meaningful and relevant work, including conducting in-person calls with prospects and existing clients at their places of business, identifying and pursuing potential new business clients, and building collaborative relationships with partners across lines of business to connect clients with specialists who can help meet their financial needs.

#### **Training**

Over the course of the program, you’ll have access to professional and leadership development training, networking, business deep dives, and one-on-one mentorship.

#### **Career Progression**

# Spring Insights

No matter your background, we have a role that will engage all of your skills. If you're curious about what life and a career at J.P. Morgan have to offer, we have the program to answer your questions. Join us for one of our Early Insight programs to gain a better understanding of the firm, how we serve clients, and how our businesses work together.

While we accept applications from all majors, we offer three tailored programs based on your area of interest: Technology, Corporate & General Management, and Wholesale Banking. Paths for students with and without finance backgrounds await in our Wholesale Banking program.

Because our work is so varied, we're looking for people with diverse perspectives, backgrounds, and skills to build long-lasting and rewarding careers. If you're planning on starting your full-time career in two years' time, this introduction to our people and businesses could help you make the right choices about where you'd like to be.

Applications are currently closed

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

Over the course of this immersive experience, you will gain an in-depth insight into our businesses, experience our inclusive culture, and get the chance to put your skills and learning into practice through a range of collaborative activities and sessions.

You'll find out what it's like to work in our business and hear first-hand about the responsibilities and workdays of everyone from analysts to managing directors. You'll discover just how deep our commitment is to our communities and employees, and how we're constantly innovating to meet their needs. We'll also help you improve your skills through a variety of sessions, and give you time to network with each other and our business leaders.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Desired qualities**

We're looking for highly motivated, intelligent, and curious students from diverse backgrounds.

#### **Key skills**

You should have excellent communication, problem-solving, and collaboration skills.

### What we offer

Our Spring Insight programs offer informational sessions, networking with senior leaders, training and simulated work experiences and the opportunity to meet other students from across the region. We tailor our program to your level of experience and interests. You'll walk away with a foundational knowledge of what a bank does, how to build a career, and an understanding of the next steps for applying to our internship programs.

#### **On-the-job experience**

During this event at the firm, you'll participate in interactive workshops, speaker series, and networking events to learn more about the industry and the many different career opportunities available. We have a diverse range of opportunities and we're looking for those with different backgrounds and experiences to join us.

#### **Training**

You'll develop your professional skills and business acumen as you make valuable connections with leaders at the firm as well as with other program participants.

#### **Career progression**

Participants may be fast-tracked for interviews for a summer internship.

title: Technology Degree Apprenticeship Program | JPMorgan Chase & Co.
raw_text:
We and our partners use cookies and other tools for advertising, to help stop fraud, and for other purposes. By using this site, you agree to how your information is used as outlined in our [Privacy Policy](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/legal/privacy).

[![Close Icon](https://www.chase.com/etc/designs/chase-ux/css/img/icon_close.svg)](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/technology-degree-apprenticeship#)

[Skip to main content](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/technology-degree-apprenticeship#main)

# Technology Degree Apprenticeship

Earn your degree while working in our technology business alongside our industry experts. The four-year degree apprenticeship program offers a comprehensive introduction to the world of technology within financial services and the chance to obtain a full honours degree in Digital and Technology Solutions from our training provider University of Exeter combined with valuable work experience at our London or Bournemouth offices.

Applications are currently closed

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

The first year will be general studies and after that, you’ll move into a specialism: software engineering, network engineering, cybersecurity, data analytics, business analysis, or IT consultancy.

Software engineers work on enhancements and upgrades to our existing software and develop new applications as part of an agile team. You may write and review code while testing applications. Our cybersecurity team is responsible for the security of our data, our clients’ information, and our systems. They rigorously test for vulnerabilities and run simulations to find areas where we can improve. In data analytics, you’ll work on solving problems using big data, to search for insights and look for patterns that we can use to improve our products and services. In IT Consultancy, you’ll work on various projects to enhance and develop technology for the firm. You could also work on cloud-based platforms, servers, and other infrastructure; monitoring for problems and resolving issues focusing on software, network, or data.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Entry requirements**

UCAS equivalent of 3 B grades at A-Level or other qualification (B grade or higher). One mathematics, computing, or IT-based subject is required. Contextual offers, as defined by the University of Exeter, are considered.

GCSEs or equivalent qualifications in English (5 or above) and Mathematics (6 or above).

#### **Key skills**

You’ll need strong communication and collaboration skills, excellent problem-solving abilities and a drive to learn will spark our interest.

### What we offer

This four-year degree apprenticeship program offers a comprehensive introduction to technology within financial services, credits towards a Bachelor of Science (Honours) in Digital and Technology Solutions, and valuable work experience at our Bournemouth or London Technology Centres.

Opportunities in software engineering, data analytics, and business analysis are available in London. In addition to those areas, our Bournemouth office offers experiences in cybersecurity, infrastructure engineering, and IT consultancy and project management.

#### **On-the-job experience**

You’ll be part of our team from day one. Learning alongside industry experts you will develop skills and knowledge to help you as you start your career with us. You’ll have real responsibilities in a real working environment.

#### **Training**

Our degree will be delivered through a blend of virtual lectures alongside our award-winning internal training. Coupled with the on-the-job learning, this will lead to your obtaining a BSc (Hons) in Digital and Technology Solutions from our Russell Group training provider University of Exeter.

#### **Career Progression**

Upon successful completion of the program, you could be offered a full-time position within the firm.

![](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/content/dam/jpmorganchase/images/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/technology-degree-apprenticeship-inside-program.jpg)

### What you'll do

The first year will be general studies and after that, you’ll move into a specialism: software engineering, network engineering, cybersecurity, data analytics, business analysis, or IT consultancy.

Software engineers work on enhancements and upgrades to our existing software and develop new applications as part of an agile team. You may write and review code while testing applications. Our cybersecurity team is responsible for the security of our data, our clients’ information, and our systems. They rigorously test for vulnerabilities and run simulations to find areas where we can improve. In data analytics, you’ll work on solving problems using big data, to search for insights and look for patterns that we can use to improve our products and services. In IT Consultancy, you’ll work on various projects to enhance and develop technology for the firm. You could also work on cloud-based platforms, servers, and other infrastructure; monitoring for problems and resolving issues focusing on software, network, or data.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Entry requirements**

UCAS equivalent of 3 B grades at A-Level or other qualification (B grade or higher). One mathematics, computing, or IT-based subject is required. Contextual offers, as defined by the University of Exeter, are considered.

GCSEs or equivalent qualifications in English (5 or above) and Mathematics (6 or above).

#### **Key skills**

You’ll need strong communication and collaboration skills, excellent problem-solving abilities and a drive to learn will spark our interest.

### What we offer

This four-year degree apprenticeship program offers a comprehensive introduction to technology within financial services, credits towards a Bachelor of Science (Honours) in Digital and Technology Solutions, and valuable work experience at our Bournemouth or London Technology Centres.

# Asset Management Investment20/20   Training Program

The Investment20/20 program is tailored to deliver the insight and understanding needed to establish your career in asset management, enabling you to own meaningful responsibilities and deliver real impact across our business.

[Apply now](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/asset-management-investment2020#first-apply-now-link)

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

Investment20/20 offers intellectually curious and driven school leavers and university graduates the opportunity to launch a career in global financial services. You'll develop a range of core skills and acquire fundamental knowledge in the asset management industry.

### Who we're looking for

We are looking for enthusiastic, intellectually curious individuals who are willing to be given real responsibilities and take on new challenges.

#### **Valued qualities**

- Positive attitude with a willingness to learn
- Natural inclination towards a team-based, collaborative environment
- Drive and determination

This year-long program will provide you with an in-depth introduction to our Asset Management business, while building your industry knowledge and professional network, enabling you to take the first step towards constructing a dynamic, long-term career with us.

Program participants will be provided with training designed to familiarise them with our firm, products, services, and culture, as well as prepare them for the CISI Investment Operations Certificate (IOC) qualifying exam. title: Quantitative Finance | JPMorgan Chase & Co.
raw_text:
We and our partners use cookies and other tools for advertising, to help stop fraud, and for other purposes. By using this site, you agree to how your information is used as outlined in our [Privacy Policy](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/legal/privacy).

[![Close Icon](https://www.chase.com/etc/designs/chase-ux/css/img/icon_close.svg)](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/quant-fin-programs#)

[Skip to main content](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/quant-fin-programs#main)

# Quantitative Finance

Our mission is to develop and maintain sophisticated mathematical models, cutting-edge methodologies, and infrastructure to value and hedge financial transactions ranging from vanilla flow products to high and low-frequency trading algorithms.

[Apply now](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/quant-fin-programs#first-apply-now-link)

## Inside the program

### What you’ll do

Spend your internship working alongside our top-tier professionals, driving innovation through financial engineering, derivatives modeling, asset and liability management, and risk management. You'll help develop or validate mathematical models, methodologies, and tools used throughout the firm while gaining in-depth insight into the world of risk modeling, investment banking, and the financial services industry.

Throughout the application process, you will have an opportunity to learn about the diverse group of teams across the firm hiring through the Quantitative Finance Programs. Interns will be placed in a role based on their background and professional interests.

### Who we’re looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We are seeking colleagues with excellent analytical, quantitative, and problem-solving skills, as well as demonstrated research skills.

Beyond that, we are most interested in the things that make you unique: the personal qualities, outside interests, and achievements beyond academia that demonstrate the kind of person you are and the difference you could bring to the team.

#### **Key skills**

Mastery of advanced mathematics (probability theory, stochastic calculus, partial differential equations, numerical analysis, statistics, econometrics) and/or the ability to program using C++ or Python.

Knowledge of options pricing theory, trading algorithms, or financial regulations.

Strong verbal and written communication skills and the ability to present findings to a non-technical audience.

### What we offer

#### **On-the-job experience**

You'll be assigned a project that will help develop your analytics and coding skills, while learning the core fundamentals of financial engineering, derivatives modeling, risk management, and in particular, machine learning.

#### **Training**

Through hands-on work experience and training courses, you'll learn first-hand about market-sector specifics, building your technical skills and industry knowledge. You'll be supported by your teammates, tutors, and mentors throughout the internship experience.

#### **Career progression**

The specialized knowledge and skills gained through the program will prepare you for a successful career at the firm. Top-performing candidates may receive a full-time offer.

### Where to learn more

Explore life at JPMorganChase with this free & self-paced virtual experience. To learn more and register, visit the [Quantitative Research](https://www.theforage.com/virtual-internships/prototype/bWqaecPDbYAwSDqJy/Quantitative-Research "Quantitative Research at JPMorgan Chase & Co, Opens in a new window") page on Forage.

\*Registration or completion of Forage virtual experience programs is optional and will not impact consideration or hiring decisions.

![](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/content/dam/jpmorganchase/images/careers/software-engineer-cohort/quant-fin-programs.jpg)

You'll help develop or validate mathematical models, methodologies, and tools used throughout the firm while gaining in-depth insight into the world of risk modeling, investment banking, and the financial services industry.

Throughout the application process, you will have an opportunity to learn about the diverse group of teams across the firm hiring through the Quantitative Finance Programs. Interns will be placed in a role based on their background and professional interests.

### Who we’re looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We are seeking colleagues with excellent analytical, quantitative, and problem-solving skills, as well as demonstrated research skills.

Beyond that, we are most interested in the things that make you unique: the personal qualities, outside interests, and achievements beyond academia that demonstrate the kind of person you are and the difference you could bring to the team.

#### **Key skills**

Mastery of advanced mathematics (probability theory, stochastic calculus, partial differential equations, numerical analysis, statistics, econometrics) and/or the ability to program using C++ or Python.

Knowledge of options pricing theory, trading algorithms, or financial regulations.

Strong verbal and written communication skills and the ability to present findings to a non-technical audience.

### What we offer

#### **On-the-job experience**

You'll be assigned a project that will help develop your analytics and coding skills, while learning the core fundamentals of financial engineering, derivatives modeling, risk management, and in particular, machine learning.

#### **Training**

# Risk Management & Compliance Program

Join our Wholesale Credit Risk, Consumer Risk, Model Development or Validation (Quantitative Risk), Corporate Risk, or Compliance functions, and manage the many risks that the firm undertakes. You'll become an expert in assessing risk across lines of businesses, risk modelling, forecasting, and corporate risk, while developing a solid understanding of compliance and governance policies.

Applications are currently closed

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

You'll work with the different functions within Risk and Compliance. You'll help evaluate and assess credit risk, conduct risk reviews, develop end-to-end risk models, forecast risk, and evaluate the firm's compliance readiness and controls.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We’re looking for individuals with a positive attitude and excellent attention to detail.

#### **Key skills**

You should have corporate finance and risk assessment acumen, communication and analytical skills, plus programming and statistical capabilities.

### What we offer

#### **Training**

Expert professionals will train new joiners on relevant skills required for the job. Take advantage of many training initiatives organized by the firm to enhance technical skills, soft skills, and personal wellbeing.

You'll have access to career mobility and career development platforms which will enable you to take advantage of the global network as well as develop relevant industry skills.

# Data & Analytics

Our Data & Analytics teams deliver excellence at the intersection of data science, research, and industry expertise. We develop technology and create solutions to help solve some of the world's most interesting financial problems, while improving our customer and client experiences every day. Whether you’re working with artificial intelligence, big data, machine learning, blockchain technology, or robotics, our entrepreneurial team environment challenges you to push the limits of your expertise in the pursuit of impactful and commercial real-world applications.

[Apply now](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/data-analytics-opportunities#first-apply-now-link)

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

Your responsibilities will vary based on your location and team assignment, and you'll build innovative solutions that make a difference for our customers, clients, and employees. Whether you’re working with artificial intelligence, blockchain technology, big data, machine learning, or robotics, our entrepreneurial team environment challenges you to push the limits of your expertise in the pursuit of impactful and commercial real-world applications. Across all projects and businesses, you’ll have the opportunity to develop your skills, work with innovative technologies, and build solutions using agile methodologies and more.

You’ll develop the skills to take your career in any direction and make a genuine contribution to our businesses from the start. We’re always looking for new ways to innovate, so your ideas and contributions will be welcomed from the beginning.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

Internships are available to students pursuing undergraduate, graduate or research-based degrees in math, statistics, sciences, engineering, computer science, or other quantitative fields.

#### **Key skills**

Requirements vary by role, but typically include:

- Knowledge of machine learning/data science theory, techniques, and tools
- Proficiency in Python, MATLAB, C++, Java, and/or C#
- Strong quantitative and analytical skills, with emphasis on problem-solving and research
- Excellent communication skills, with the ability to convey technical information to non-technical audiences

### What we offer

Your professional growth and development will be supported throughout the internship program via project work related to your academic and professional interests, mentorship, engaging speaker series with senior leaders, and more.

#### **Training**

Through research and hands-on work experience, you'll develop solutions and technology that help solve the world's most interesting financial problems, and improve and protect our customer and client experiences every day. You'll be supported by your teammates, tutors, and mentors throughout the internship experience.

#### **Career progression**

The specialized knowledge and skills gained through the program will prepare you for a successful career at the firm. Top-performing candidates may receive a full-time offer.

### Where to learn more

Explore life at JPMorganChase with this free & self-paced virtual experience. To learn more and register, visit the [Quantitative Research](https://www.theforage.com/simulations/jpmorgan/quantitative-research-11oc) page on Forage.

\*Registration or completion of Forage virtual experience programs is optional and will not impact consideration or hiring decisions.

We and our partners use cookies and other tools for advertising, to help stop fraud, and for other purposes. By using this site, you agree to how your information is used as outlined in our [Privacy Policy](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/legal/privacy).

[![Close Icon](https://www.chase.com/etc/designs/chase-ux/css/img/icon_close.svg)](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/software-engineer-summer#)

[Skip to main content](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/software-engineer-summer#main)

# Software Engineer Program

You'll benefit from a multi-billion annual investment in technology, working in one of the world’s biggest tech companies. You’ll work in an open, collaborative, and supportive culture, where our agile teams are constantly innovating, learning new skills, and at the forefront of developing new technologies and solutions.

With the scale of our business, you could impact millions of consumers, thousands of enterprise clients, and 300,000+ employees. We’re committed to advancing your career helping you acquire new skills, opportunities, and a global network of support that will help you take your career in any direction imaginable.

[Apply now](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/software-engineer-summer#first-apply-now-link)

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

As a summer intern, you’ll help build and optimize digital applications and systems that support millions of customers, clients, and employees worldwide. The internship will begin with an induction training covering our tech strategies, products, and systems, as well as an overview of our technology community.  You will work in an agile team with peers and experienced software engineers to grow your skills, share ideas and innovate with our global technology community. You’ll gain deeper insight into what it means to work here through networking events, senior speaker sessions, and peer-mentorship programs.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We are seeking well-rounded, enthusiastic, and motivated individuals, particularly those majoring in Computer Science and/or Engineering, who are eager to make a direct impact on our business from day one. Regardless of your background, we value candidates with a strong interest in financial services who are attuned to industry-wide technology trends and best practices, and who possess a thirst for learning, growth, and innovation.

Collaboration is at the heart of our teams, so we are looking for candidates with excellent teamwork skills and demonstrated leadership abilities. You should be able to work effectively in large, collaborative teams to achieve organizational goals and be passionate about fostering an innovative culture.

#### **Key skills**

We are looking for applicants who possess a foundational knowledge of programming languages, such as Python, JavaScript, Java, C++, or C#, along with expertise in databases, data structures, and algorithms. Ideal applicants will have experience across the entire software development life cycle (SDLC) and exposure to agile methodologies, including continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD), application resiliency, and security. We value emerging knowledge of software applications and technical processes within specialized disciplines, like cloud computing, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and mobile technologies. Additionally, a solid understanding of software skills, including business analysis, development, maintenance, and software improvement is essential for success in our dynamic environment.

### What we offer

This internship will give you the opportunity to learn about our technology business and develop your career. You will work on projects that deliver real solutions for our customers clients, and businesses. No matter if you’re working on payment solutions or trading algorithms around the world, you’ll see tangible results from your work.

#### **On-the-job experience**

Dive headfirst into creating innovative solutions that make a difference for our customers, clients, and employees. Our program is designed to make sure you’re supported and learning new skills. You’ll have clear priorities and projects where you’ll be able to make a difference across our business and add value from the start.

You are encouraged to take time to explore, shadowing other teams and networking with various people. You'll be fully integrated into our technology community with the opportunity to attend social events and tech talks, interact with senior leaders, and more.

#### **Training**

You’ll begin with a comprehensive firmwide orientation, followed by an induction training   to teach you about our businesses, build upon your knowledge of development methodologies, and also develop your professional skills.

You’ll have access to continuous training to build your technical and business skills. We’ll cover topics ranging from cybersecurity to presentation skills to further your career development. Our teams are dedicated to your support and advocacy throughout the ten weeks of the program.

#### **Career progression**

Top performers may receive the opportunity to join us for a full-time role in the [Software Engineer Program](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/software-engineer-fulltime "Software Engineer Program") upon graduation.

### Where to learn more

Explore life at JPMorganChase with this free & self-paced virtual experience. To learn more and register, visit the [Software Engineering](https://www.theforage.com/simulations/jpmorgan/advanced-software-engineering-r0fm "Explore Forage") page on Forage.

\*Registration or completion of Forage virtual experience programs is optional and will not impact consideration or hiring decisions.

![](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/content/dam/jpmorganchase/images/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/cadp-summer-anal

# Cybersecurity and Technology Controls

Join Cybersecurity and Technology Controls (CTC) and become part of a diverse, mission-driven global community. We move at the pace of evolving technology, staying ahead of complex threats, and making a significant impact in regulatory and geopolitical spheres. With expansive operations, you could make a positive difference by safeguarding millions of customers and employees.

We're committed to innovative initiatives, employee development programs, and diversity and inclusion efforts across the CTC community. We're dedicated to advancing your career, fostering skill growth, and providing access to a vast global network that can steer your career in any direction you choose.

Applications are currently closed

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

Your responsibilities, tailored to your location and team, involve crafting innovative cybersecurity solutions that impact customers, clients, and employees. From refining design and analytics to coding and testing high-quality software, you'll own projects end-to-end, ensuring transparent communication with teams and stakeholders.

The work is diverse – securing digital features, strategizing big data for enhanced cybersecurity, innovating solutions, engineering global-scale automated recovery strategies, and supporting cybersecurity platform integration. Across projects, you'll enhance your coding skills, work with cutting-edge technologies, and employ agile methodologies. This dynamic environment allows you to shape your cybersecurity career and contribute meaningfully from the start. Your ideas and contributions are valued as we continually seek new ways to innovate.

### Who we're looking for

Whether you’re an individual contributor or senior leader, your skill set in **engineering and architecture, product management, cyber operations, or information security management** will enable impact within our Cybersecurity & Technology Controls (CTC) organization.

We value experience in the following areas:

- Cloud Security
- Product Security Engineering & Architecture
- AI & Machine Learning
- Red/Blue/Purple Teaming, Penetration Testing, Attack Analysis, Malware Engineering
- Application Security
- Data Management & Protection
- Data Science
- Cryptography & Blockchain
- Secure Software Development
- DevSecOps & Site Reliability Engineering
- Governance, Risk & Controls
- Network & Infrastructure Security

### What we offer

Explore exciting full-time opportunities within our dynamic cybersecurity organization, providing a platform for career development and hands-on involvement in projects that deliver real solutions for customers, clients, and businesses.

Take the lead in groundbreaking initiatives shaping the future of cybersecurity and technology, contributing to projects that fortify the security posture for the company and those whom we serve.

Discover the strength of diverse and inclusive teams, recognizing their positive influence on our products and services, enabling us to better serve customers, employees, and the wider community.

As a cybersecurity subject matter expert, you'll play a pivotal role in defining, designing, and refining the technological framework, supported by cutting-edge technology, tools, and systems tailored to ensure your success. Seize the opportunity to take charge and navigate obstacles with innovative, original, and highly effective solutions.

#### **On-the-job experience**

Immerse yourself in the creation of innovative solutions that leave a lasting impact. Our collaborative framework is meticulously designed to provide robust support and foster continuous learning, ensuring you acquire new skills throughout your journey. With clearly defined priorities and projects, you'll have the opportunity to make a meaningful difference across our business and contribute value from day one.

Encouraged to take the time to explore, you can shadow other teams and network with diverse professionals. Fully integrated into our dynamic technology community, you'll not only have the chance to attend engaging learning events and tech talks but also participate in inclusive mentorship opportunities with senior leaders. This is an invitation to be part of a transformative environment where your contributions matter, and your growth is nurtured.

# Software Development Graduate Level Apprenticeship

Over 2,500 technologists develop and support global systems using cutting-edge technologies at our Glasgow Technology Centre. Joining this team as a Software Development Apprentice, you will learn how to analyze, develop, and test code, while working towards an honours degree in software development.

Applications are currently closed

### Inside the program

### What you'll do

You will acquire underpinning knowledge and understanding of software development via a blended online learning and on-campus delivery model with core IT competencies being developed through an integrated, work-based, learning curriculum. The on-campus delivery will allow you to hone your programming and software development skills with support from experienced academics and professionals.

We offer an environment of support and personal investment where you’re given the opportunity to develop your career alongside your personal and technical skills. Our software engineers work on enhancements and upgrades to our existing software and develop new applications as part of an Agile team. You will likely review code and test applications and you’ll be part of the team, making a contribution to our business while applying the knowledge that you’re learning in the classroom.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Entry requirements**

We require a minimum of BBBB (or equivalent), including Maths or Computer Science or Physics, at Scottish Higher level (or equivalent). If there are extenuating circumstances and you do not meet these academic requirements you will have the opportunity to highlight this within your application.

#### **Key skills**

You’ll need strong analytical skills, excellent problem-solving abilities, and a continuous learning mindset.

### What we offer

The four-year degree apprenticeship program offers a comprehensive introduction to the world of technology within financial services and the chance to obtain a full honours degree alongside valuable work experience at our Glasgow technology hub.

#### **On-the-job experience**

You’ll be part of our team from day one. Learning alongside industry experts you will develop skills and knowledge to help you as you start your career with us. You’ll have real responsibilities in a real working environment.

#### **Training**

Your degree will be delivered through a blend of virtual and in-person lectures alongside our award-winning internal training. Coupled with the on-the-job learning, this will lead to you obtaining a BSc (Hons) in Software Development.

#### **Career progression**

Upon successful completion of the program, you could be offered a full-time position within the firm.

# Customer Service Apprenticeship

Develop fundamental customer service skills for financial services as you learn from and work alongside experts in the retail finance sector. Earn industry-recognised qualifications following successful completion of the apprenticeship.

Applications are currently closed

## Apply now



Please note, only locations where this program is currently open will be displayed. If you're not able to find your desired location, please follow us on Facebook or Linkedin for program application updates.


## Inside the program

### What you'll do

You will cultivate your customer service skill set and learn its principles through classroom study and hands-on application. Upon conclusion of this program, you will be positioned to earn a valuable, industry-recognised qualification.

### Who we’re looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We’re looking for team players who are lifelong learners, equipped with a growth mindset and a drive to deliver first-class service to customers and clients.

#### **Key skills**

You’ll need strong critical-thinking, problem-solving, and multi-tasking skills. Your ability to listen, empathize, and provide a high level of customer service are also valuable skills in this role.

### What we offer

This apprenticeship offers a comprehensive introduction to customer service within financial services, and the chance to obtain a qualification alongside valuable work experience.

You’ll develop your professional network, hear from senior leaders, and learn from industry experts. By applying your classroom learning to meaningful contributions for our business, you’ll gain technical and practical skills that will benefit your career.

#### **On-the-job experience**

You’ll join one of our teams, contributing to our business from day one, while studying for your qualification.

#### **Training**

You will have a dedicated study/development day each week. Your qualification will be administered through our external trainer, which is partnered with our internal training team to ensure you have the best chance of success.

#### **Career progression**

Upon successful completion of the program, you could be offered a full-time position within the business.

title: How we hire FAQ | JPMorganChase
raw_text:
We and our partners use cookies and other tools for advertising, to help stop fraud, and for other purposes. By using this site, you agree to how your information is used as outlined in our [Privacy Policy](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/legal/privacy).

[![Close Icon](https://www.chase.com/etc/designs/chase-ux/css/img/icon_close.svg)](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/how-we-hire/faqs#)

[Skip to main content](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/how-we-hire/faqs#main)

# Frequently asked questions

## General questions

### How can I get more information about working at JPMorganChase?

You can learn about us, our culture, different career areas and more on our [careers site](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers "Career Site"). On our careers site you can search for, view and apply to open job opportunities on the [job search page](https://jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001 "Job Search Page").

### Can I search and apply for job opportunities using my mobile device?

You can use any mobile device (cell phone and/or tablet), laptop or desktop computer to search and apply for job opportunities on the [job search page](https://jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001 "Job Search Page").

### How do I create a new profile?

When you go to the [job search page](https://jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001 "Job Search Page") on our careers site, you can create a profile by applying to a job opportunity, joining our [Talent Community](https://jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001/tc-join "Talent Community"), or clicking the person icon (Manage Profile) and then following the prompts.

### How do I log into my existing profile?

When you return to the [job search page](https://jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001 "Job Search Page"), you can log into your existing profile by clicking the person icon (Manage Profile) and then following the prompts.

### What is the recommended Internet browser I should use to search and apply for a job opportunity?

For the most optimal experience, use Chrome or Firefox.

### What should I do if I have issues logging into my existing profile on the careers site?

Be sure to use Chrome or Firefox as your Internet browser when you log into your profile on the [job search page](https://jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001 "Job Search Page"). If you still experience issues, try clearing your cache.

### Does JPMorganChase provide accessibility accommodations during the recruiting process?

Reasonable accommodations are made for any mental health or physical disability needs in accordance with applicable law. You can request an accommodation, at any time, via [email](mailto:mah.ges@jpmchase.com?subject=Accessibility%20Accommodation%20Request "Email ") \- include your full name, phone number and information about the type of accommodation you need.

## Job search

### Do I need to create a profile to search for job opportunities?

A profile is not required to search for jobs, however, creating one will allow you to view saved job postings marked as favorites and to apply for job opportunities.

### How can I find job opportunities that match my specific interests and/or location preferences?

You can search for job opportunities on the [job search page](https://jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001 "Job Search Page") by entering a job title, skill or keyword in the “Find Jobs” box. In the “Near Location” box, you may narrow your search by entering a specific location. Additionally, you may apply filters to select My Location or Postal Code from the “Near Location” dropdown and/or use the radius dropdown to expand or decrease your search criteria.

### How can I search for a specific job requisition number?

On the [job search page](https://jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001 "Job Search Page") enter the requisition number in the “Find Jobs” box to find the job opportunity.

### Why am I unable to find a specific job requisition number?

If the search results do not populate when you enter a job requisition number on the [job search page](https://jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001 "Job Search Page"), confirm the requisition number is entered correctly. Then, check the filters to ensure the search results are not excluding the requisition.

If you are still unable to find the job requisition number, it is likely that the job opportunity is no longer available. Please feel free to search the [job search page](https://jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001 "Job Search Page") for other opportunities that match your areas of interest.

### What does it mean when a job opportunity has more than one location listed?

Generally, when more than one location is listed for a job opportunity, it means that there are multiple positions available at different locations or there is one position where multiple locations may be considered based on business needs.

### How can I mark a job opportunity as a favorite?

On the [job search page](https://jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001 "Job Search Page") you can mark a job opportunity as a favorite by clicking the star icon within the job posting.

To view your favorites at a later time, log into your existing profile or create a new profile, then click on the star icon in the upper right corner on the job search page.

### How can I subscribe to receive email alerts about new job opportunities?

To subscribe to job opportunity alerts, follow the instructions:

If you are logging into our careers site for the first time, you can create a profile by joining our [Talent Community](https://jpmc.fa.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1001/tc-join "Talent Community"). Start by entering your email a

# Risk Management Analyst Program

Risk management is critical to every aspect of our businesses from developing trading models to structuring financing for mergers and acquisitions (M&A). You will mitigate and manage risk, and maintain transparency with management, clients, regulators, and shareholders.

[Apply now](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/risk-summer-analyst#first-apply-now-link)

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

In this program, you’ll be placed in one of our Credit, Cybersecurity and Technology Controls, Country Risk, or Market Risk teams. You'll help build critical capabilities that allow the firm to manage any kind of market.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

You should have a positive attitude, be cooperative and intelligent, exercise sound judgment, and be detail-oriented and driven.

#### **Key skills**

You should have excellent written and verbal communication skills, sharp analytical skills, and be familiar with corporate finance and capital markets.

### What we offer

#### **On-the-job experience**

You’ll gain an in-depth understanding of risk management, working across industries and responding to client requests. You’ll actively contribute to deals, such as M&A and financing transactions, and participate in all other aspects of client credit management.

#### **Training**

You’ll start with intensive banking and markets training. Over the course of the internship, you’ll have the opportunity to hear from and meet senior leaders and network with colleagues and mentors.

#### **Career progression**

The skills, exposure, and industry relationships gained through the summer program offer ample opportunity to advance your career. Top performers may receive a full-time offer upon successfully completing the program.

[Skip to main content](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/investment-banking-summer-analyst#main)

# Investment Banking Analyst Program

Work alongside the top professionals in the industry to come up with solutions that shape the global economy. Investment banking teams partner with corporate clients to achieve their strategic goals. Whether it is raising capital for an expansion or buying another company, investment bankers provide innovative and creative financial solutions for all clients’ needs. You’ll be part of a global, fast-paced team that does business with more than 90% of Fortune 500 companies.

[Apply now](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/investment-banking-summer-analyst#first-apply-now-link)

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

You’ll join one of our investment banking groups. Through hands-on experience and ongoing education, you’ll develop core investment banking skills to help support our clients’ businesses while launching your career in the industry. You’ll benefit from direct exposure to deals and transactions and interact with clients and teams globally.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We value diversity of thought, backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We’re looking for those who have innovative ideas and entrepreneurial qualities, and who enjoy tackling new challenges and solving intellectual problems.

We’re looking for motivated, resourceful, analytical people who are ready to contribute from the beginning. If you have exceptional interpersonal and communication skills and thrive in a dynamic, collaborative environment, then this is the role for you.

#### **Key skills**

You should demonstrate excellent analytical, quantitative, and interpretative skills, and be able to thrive in dynamic and collaborative work environments. You should also be adaptable, flexible, and resilient, capable of navigating and contributing to various situations.

### What we offer

#### **On-the-job experience**

You’ll join one of our Coverage (Industry), Advisory, or Capital Markets groups for nine weeks, developing meaningful solutions for clients or executing high-value transactions. This program will provide you the opportunity to develop the skills and experience to become a thoughtful, strategic advisor. You’ll learn the nature of client service and how we build long-term relationships by putting their needs first, while developing the technical acumen to launch a career in banking.

#### **Training**

This nine-week program starts with five days of orientation and classroom instruction on accounting fundamentals, financial modeling, valuation, and Excel. You’ll also familiarize yourself with our products, services, and business practices. Supplemental training will be provided throughout the summer to complement what you learn on-the-job.

You’ll develop your professional network through various opportunities to interact with people from across the business, as well as other interns. We’ll pair you with mentors to help you navigate the firm and offer guidance as you develop your skills.

#### **Career progression**

High performing interns may receive an offer of continued employment with the firm at the end of the program.

### Where to learn more

Explore life at JPMorganChase with this free & self-paced virtual experience. To learn more and register, visit the [Investment Banking page](https://www.theforage.com/virtual-internships/prototype/YD2kY95RQxQtXxFTS/JPM-IB-Virtual-Experience-Program "JP Morgan Investment Banking page on Forage") on Forage.

\*Registration or completion of Forage virtual experience programs is optional and will not impact consideration or hiring decisions.

# Design Development Program Internship

Start your career by joining our Experience Design and Research teams to learn, grow, and contribute to JPMorganChase’s portfolio of work.

This summer internship will guide you as you create dynamic visual solutions, research the needs of our users, and drive design thinking on matters that add value to our business and have real-life impact on our customers.

Applications are currently closed

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

During your summer internship, you will have the opportunity to design and redesign product experiences under the guidance and direction of user experience leads, participate in user research to better understand user needs and behaviors, and engage in usability testing.

You’ll focus on ideation and prototyping to explore different design options, landing on unexpected solutions.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We’re looking for passionate, dynamic, and motivated individuals with applicable undergraduate majors and an interest in user experience design, interaction design, or user research.

We are looking for people who are open to collaborating with others and demonstrate excellent teamwork skills.

#### **Key skills**

We’re looking for individuals who demonstrate early development in adjacent skills such as user research, UX writing, and prototyping.

### What we offer

Learn and develop your skill set in user design or user research as a member of our Experience Design team.

This summer internship will guide you as you create dynamic visual solutions, research the needs of our users, and drive design thinking on matters that add value to our business and have real-life impact on our customers.

#### **On-the-job experience**

From the start, you’ll have the support you need to succeed. Dive head-first and gain hands-on experience creating innovative solutions that make a difference for our customers, clients, and employees.

Our managers receive extensive training on how to help interns make the most of their program. You’ll have clear priorities and frequent check-ins throughout the internship to make sure you’re achieving your goals.

Interns are encouraged to take time to explore, shadowing other teams and networking with various people. We offer social events and other activities in our business resource groups to help you expand your professional network across our lines of business.

#### **Training**

You'll work on teams with peers and experienced designers and researchers to grow your skills, share ideas, and innovate with our technology community all over the world. We provide deeper insight into what it means to work here through networking events, senior speaker sessions, and peer mentorship programs.

#### **Career Progression**

Those who successfully complete the program may be offered a position in our full-time [Design Development Program](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/design-dev-fulltime "Full time").

![](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/content/dam/jpmorganchase/images/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/design-dev-summer.jpg)

During your summer internship, you will have the opportunity to design and redesign product experiences under the guidance and direction of user experience leads, participate in user research to better understand user needs and behaviors, and engage in usability testing.

You’ll focus on ideation and prototyping to explore different design options, landing on unexpected solutions.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We’re looking for passionate, dynamic, and motivated individuals with applicable undergraduate majors and an interest in user experience design, interaction design, or user research.

We are looking for people who are open to collaborating with others and demonstrate excellent teamwork skills.

#### **Key skills**

We’re looking for individuals who demonstrate early development in adjacent skills such as user research, UX writing, and prototyping.

# Career.edYOU Academy

Career.edYOU Academy is a selective, virtual educational program designed for college sophomores in the United States interested in a career at JPMorganChase. This program will deliver an immersive experience introducing you to internship opportunities in finance and technology, while providing insight into the recruiting process. This experience will prepare you for summer internships!

**Registration is closed**

2024 Career.edYOU Academy highlights include:

- 910





sophomore students participated in the program

- 246





colleges and universities represented among participants

- 99%





of survey respondents felt better prepared for the interview process[1](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/career-edyou#footnote-1)

- 100%





of survey respondents would recommend Career.edYOU Academy to a friend[1](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/career-edyou#footnote-1)


## Inside the program

### What you'll do

You will receive a syllabus of virtual sessions that will need to be completed in sequential order over the course of the semester. In these live virtual sessions, we will introduce you to our firm, culture, lines of business, and interview preparation. You will have the opportunity to connect virtually with the recruiting team and other employees at the firm to grow your network.

Your participation will be tracked to ensure you have completed the program and marked for early consideration. The more engaged you are in this virtual program, the better prepared you will be for the application process.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Desired qualities**

This virtual program is designed for college sophomores studying in the United States.

We are looking for students who are willing to engage each session’s content and presenters, dedicated to completing the program, and eager to leverage the knowledge gained throughout the semester-long program.

#### **Key skills**

In order to maximize your virtual experience, we are looking for students eager to learn and engage in the sessions. You must be motivated and willing to connect with others and grow your network. These skills are essential for success within this exploratory program.

### What we offer

#### **Introduction**

Over the course of this virtual program, you will attend sessions focused on JPMorganChase education and career development. By the end, you will be prepared to identify your top programs and be ready for our recruiting process.

#### **On-the-job experience**

Through a series of virtual, live, and educational sessions with our Career.edYOU Academy Team, recruiters, and various business representatives, you will learn about the firm's culture, how we impact the clients, consumers and communities we serve. This knowledge will better prepare you to start a career with us.

#### **Training**

Our curriculum features a series of virtual 1-hour sessions throughout the semester that takes you through the foundational knowledge of the firm, lines of business, interview and application preparation. These topics will need to be completed in sequential order to receive credit of completion.

#### **Career progression**

You will recieve a certification at the end of this semester long program. This virtual program is designed to help you explore our internship opportunities and develop stronger professional skills to support your success in our recruiting process.
