# Chase Associate Program

In this management development program, you’ll gain the skills needed to be a leader in our Consumer and Community Banking line of business. You’ll learn about our products, services, and customers by working on meaningful, innovative projects that support our strategies and priorities. Learn what it means to be a leader at Chase and how your skills will help shape the future of our business.

Applications are currently closed

## Apply now



Please note, only locations where this program is currently open will be displayed. If you're not able to find your desired location, please follow us on Facebook or Linkedin for program application updates.


## Inside the program

### What you'll do

While day-to-day responsibilities will vary based on your placement, you’ll build your foundational knowledge, professional skills, and experiences to take your career in many different directions. You’ll work on strategic projects including using data analytics to measure operational effectiveness, driving product development, leading project management efforts, evaluating business strategies, or developing innovative solutions to key business cases.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We’re looking for leaders with highly developed critical thinking, problem-solving and analytical skills. Our leaders are results-oriented and have the ability to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment. Adaptability is key since you’ll be working in different team environments with varying management styles.

#### **Key skills**

You’ll need clear communication skills, the abilities to synthesize and present information, and craft clear messages for decision-makers.

### What we offer

This two-year rotational program develops future leaders in Consumer & Community Banking. You’ll participate in three eight-month rotations designed to deepen your knowledge of Chase through exposure to our business units: Auto, Business Banking, Card Services, Connected Commerce, Consumer Banking, Data and Analytics, Digital Product & Experience, Finance, Home Lending, J.P. Morgan Wealth Management, Marketing and Communications, Controls, Operations, Risk Management, and Strategy.

Program Associates will gain experience rotating through roles within three of four program disciplines: Data & Analytics, Product, Project/Program Management, and Strategy & Strategic Initiatives.

#### **On-the-job experience**

The Chase Associate Program is designed to provide you with a uniquely broad set of experiences that will help you advance in your career and become a future leader at the firm. Your projects may include using data analytics to measure operational effectiveness, driving product development through the lifecycle – testing, iterating, measuring and marketing new features; leading project management efforts for high visibility of our brands, evaluating and quantifying business strategies in line with regulatory controls, or developing innovative solutions to key business cases by collaborating across business, product areas, and functions.

#### **Training**

You’ll be provided with continuous support over the two years of the program, including rigorous trainings, formalized mentoring, professional and social networking opportunities, exposure to senior leadership, and professional development training. Our training curriculum will also provide a strong support network comprised of a dedicated program manager and mentor who collectively partner to ensure you have robust learning opportunities.

#### **Career progression**

Upon successful completion of the program, you’ll utilize the network and knowledge gained throughout your rotations to help you identify your next role – one that best suits your interests and skills.

While day-to-day responsibilities will vary based on your placement, you’ll build your foundational knowledge, professional skills, and experiences to take your career in many different directions. # Asset & Wealth Management Challenge

Learn about Asset & Wealth Management by immersing yourself in the dynamics and decisions of this case challenge. Through a hypothetical case study, you’ll find out what it takes to work in our Asset Management or Global Private Bank lines of business. Take this opportunity to learn more about the industry and the important role we play in it.

Applications are currently closed

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

As part of the challenge, you will compete on a team of four students from across different locations in Asia by completing a case study. You’ll gain knowledge of how the business works, get access to senior leaders, and gain invaluable skills that prepare you for future opportunities at the firm.

Comprised of two rounds, the competition is hosted independently in each location and consists of written submissions and presentations. Finalists from each location compete in the final round.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Desired qualities**

We're looking for motivated and driven team players with excellent communication and analytical skills who are highly inquisitive, focused, collaborative, and enjoy tackling new challenges intellectual problems.

#### **Key skills**

We're looking for excellent problem solvers with a strong interest in financial markets and economic trends.

### What we offer

#### **On-the-job experience**

The challenge puts you right in the middle of the action. Through a hypothetical case study, you'll find out what it takes to work in Asset Management or the Global Private Bank. You’ll work in student teams of four to complete a case study analysis, gaining exposure to asset allocation, client management, and scenario analysis. You’ll develop valuable industry knowledge, communication, and analytical skills.

#### **Training**

Teams that advance past the first round will work with J.P. Morgan business representatives and mentors that provide guidance and advice for second to final round presentations.

#### **Career progression**

Participants who perform well may be considered for future internship opportunities.

# Internal Audit Analyst Program

In Internal Audit, we assess the control processes that drive our global business—identifying areas of improvement to help safeguard the firm. These reviews begin with understanding our business processes, developing process flows, and testing and presenting reports to management. We work with regulators, business leaders, and others to make sure we’re doing this in the most effective manner. Our team is divided into two areas of focus: technology and business audit.

Applications are currently closed

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

You'll make meaningful contributions to our global business operations on one of our internal audit teams, which support Asset & Wealth Management, Consumer & Community Banking, Commercial & Investment Banking, Corporate Functions, and Enterprise Technology. Our teams identify and analyze risks in our businesses and evaluate how we control those. You’ll also test controls by reviewing documents, meeting with management, and observing operations. You’ll learn about our businesses from the inside, gaining detailed knowledge of the industry and how our teams and technology function together.

Our technology teams focus on reviews of business applications, data management, global infrastructure, digital technologies, and cyber/information security. By providing management with feedback regarding the control environment, you’ll help to safeguard our firm and continue to best serve our clients.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We’re looking for professionals from a variety of backgrounds, experience, and skills to join our team. We expect you to have the highest standards of integrity and professionalism with a strong work ethic. You’ll need to have strong attention to detail and be able to see the big picture. We’re looking for independent, analytical thinkers who can quickly adapt to new situations. You should be able to clearly communicate with all types of people and provide feedback to our businesses.

#### **Key skills**

We’re looking for those who are honest, curious, collaborative, well-rounded, and motivated. You should have an interest in business, finance, or technology as well as the ability to apply what you know to complex situations.

### What we offer

Full-time analysts focus on business or technology roles in this 18-month program. You’ll collaborate with our Internal Audit teams to identify and analyze business risks, review digital technologies, and evaluate information security across the firm.

#### **On-the-job experience**

Experiencing every phase of an audit, you’ll prepare continuous monitoring strategies, plan audits, conduct business walkthroughs, guide fieldwork testing, interview stakeholders, identify and communicate issues, and prepare audit reports.

#### **Training**

The first week of the program begins with a firmwide orientation, plus core audit and professional skills training. The development continues with 60 hours of training each year and support in your pursuit of professional certifications.

#### **Career progression**

We invest in the retention and development of our talent, offering analysts a broad platform to launch a career within Internal Audit. After the full-time program, high-performing analysts may be considered for advancement  and build long-lasting careers with us.

[Skip to main content](https://www.jpmorganchase.com/careers/explore-opportunities/programs/software-engineer-fulltime#main)

# Software Engineer Program

You'll benefit from a multi-billion annual investment in technology, working in one of the world’s biggest tech companies. You’ll work in an open, collaborative, and supportive culture, where our agile teams are constantly innovating, learning new skills, and at the forefront of developing new technologies and solutions.

With the scale of our business, you could impact millions of consumers, thousands of enterprise clients, and 300,000+ employees. We’re committed to advancing your career helping you acquire new skills, opportunities, and a global network of support that will help you take your career in any direction imaginable.

Applications are currently closed

## Inside the program

### What you'll do

You’ll gain foundational technical and professional skills to build a successful career in technology and robust networks. The program offers opportunities for job growth, accelerated career advancement, and mobility. It begins with an in-depth induction that introduces you to our businesses, enhances your understanding of development methodologies, and sharpens your professional skills, focusing on the holistic development of your technology, professional, and leadership competencies.

You'll join an inspiring and curious team of technologists who will support you in developing new skills, exploring diverse projects and businesses, and advancing your career. This role offers a collaborative, trusting, and thought-provoking environment that encourages diversity of thought and creative solutions in the best interests of our global customers. You'll contribute to building and optimizing digital applications and systems that serve millions of customers, clients, and employees worldwide. You'll apply your expertise across the software development life cycle and collaborate with stakeholders to stay focused on common goals.

### Who we're looking for

#### **Valued qualities**

We are seeking well-rounded, enthusiastic, and motivated individuals, particularly those majoring in Computer Science and/or Engineering, who are eager to make a direct impact on our business from day one. Regardless of your background, we value candidates with a strong interest in financial services who are attuned to industry-wide technology trends and best practices, and who possess a thirst for learning, growth, and innovation.

Collaboration is at the heart of our teams, so we are looking for candidates with excellent teamwork skills and demonstrated leadership abilities. You should be able to work effectively in large, collaborative teams to achieve organizational goals and be passionate about fostering an innovative culture.

#### **Key skills**

We are looking for applicants who possess a strong foundational knowledge of programming languages, such as Python, JavaScript, Java, C++, or C#, along with expertise in databases, data structures, and algorithms. Ideal applicants will have experience across the entire software development life cycle (SDLC) and exposure to agile methodologies, including continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD), application resiliency, and security. We value emerging knowledge of software applications and technical processes within specialized disciplines, like cloud computing, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and mobile technologies. Additionally, a solid understanding of software skills, including business analysis, development, maintenance, and software improvement is essential for success in our dynamic environment.

### What we offer

This full-time program will give you the opportunity to learn about our technology business and develop your career. You could work on projects that deliver real solutions for our customers,  clients, and businesses. No matter if you’re working on payment solutions or trading algorithms around the world, you’ll see tangible results from your work.

#### **On-the-job experience**

Dive headfirst into creating innovative solutions that make a difference for our customers, clients, and employees. Our program is designed to make sure you’re supported and learning new skills. You’ll have clear priorities and projects where you’ll be able to make a difference across our business and add value from the start.

You are encouraged to take time to explore, shadow other teams, and network with various people. You'll be fully integrated into our technology community with the opportunity to attend social events and tech talks, interact with senior leaders, and more.

#### **Training**

You’ll begin with a comprehensive induction program to learn about our businesses, build on your knowledge of development methodologies, and develop your professional skills. You'll have the chance to join our agile Force for Good teams to create real-world technology solutions for non-profit organizations through a series of “side” projects that take place over several months.

You’ll have access to continuous training both on-the-job and via courses to build your technical and business skills. We’ll cover topics ranging from cybersecurity to presentation skills to further your career development. Our teams are dedicated to your support and advocacy throughout the two years of the program.
